source: GreenX ASX release — Tannenberg JORC 2012 Exploration Target (May 2026)

resourceReporting.disclosureNote: No mineral reserves or mineral resources declared. Tannenberg figure is a JORC 2012 Exploration Target only (conceptual). Eleonore North and legacy ARC Greenland assets are excluded from metal inventory.

rows.notes: 144–279 Mt @ 0.9–1.4% Cu and 15–21 g/t Ag; 69–188 Moz Ag. Insufficient exploration for a Mineral Resource.
Au / W / Sb targets (Noa, Margeries); no resource or ET in tracker

disclaimers: Exploration Target is conceptual under JORC 2012 — not a Mineral Resource or Reserve.
EV/lb Cu and EV/oz Ag use midpoint contained metal from the ET range vs group EV (~A$277M mkt cap).
